name: Shuanghua Holdings Limited
summary: Shuanghua Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells auto air-conditioner parts and components in Mainland China, other Asian countries, the United States, Canada, and internationally. It also manufactures and sells heaters, intercoolers, liquid-gas separators, evaporators, condenser cores, pipes, and thermostats. In addition, the company is involved in the sale of automotive lubricants; and import and export of automobile air-conditioner parts and components. It offers its products under the Shuanghua and Youshen brand names to domestic original equipment manufacturers and international aftermarket customers. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Shuanghua Autoparts Co., Ltd. Shuanghua Holdings Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
